patterns.description: git commit (incl. --amend) — needs explicit user permission
git push (incl. --force / --delete) — needs explicit user permission
git history mutation — needs explicit user permission
git reset discarding changes — needs explicit user permission
git restore discarding worktree changes — needs explicit user permission
git branch delete — needs explicit user permission
git tag delete — needs explicit user permission
git stash drop/clear — needs explicit user permission
git clean (destructive) — needs explicit user permission
git checkout discarding uncommitted changes — needs explicit user permission
git config global/system write — needs explicit user permission
gh remote-mutating command — needs explicit user permission
